description: Before sharing a report externally, an agent must redact all personally identifiable information (PII) and client-confidential terms.

nodes.task_description: Scan the document to identify all instances of PII (names, emails, phone numbers).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies all PII in the text.

nodes.task_description: Scan the document for a predefined list of confidential project codenames.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies all instances of the codenames.

nodes.task_description: Create a new version of the document with all identified sensitive information replaced with '[REDACTED]'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a clean, redacted version of the report.
